title: acer ningpoense
intro: Acer ningpoense, also known as the Ningpo paperbark maple or paperbark maple, is a deciduous tree species native to eastern China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Acer ningpoense include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, Acer ningpoense is often prepared into herbal decoctions, teas, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
